highTensionHighAggression: Diplomatic approach recommended — military escalation risks war.
lowOilFlow: Priority: restore oil flow. Naval patrol and coalition recommended.
highFogOfWar: Intelligence is critical. Deploy surveillance assets.
lowApproval: Domestic support collapsing. Consider media campaign.
lowBudget: Budget critical. Cut costs or negotiate burden-sharing.
default: Stay the course. Monitor the situation.
